external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes since 2026-04-17 methodology.json and kill-shot badge demotions.

internal_issues.description: SEC-8b.3 L3a missing non-discrimination sentence for Pass band — FIXED this run by EXP-191 integration

Workflow gap: stale analyst assessments can silently overwrite human-approved verdicts (commit 209fda5 regression). Requires decider integration guard: check closed-issues for same prediction_id before applying analyst assessment.
Pre-push integrity gate missing verdict_history consistency check. our_verdict should always match verdict_history[last].to.
WIN-019: cusp-count argument not deployed. 8/3 gear ratio in Spirograph produces 8-cusped epicycloid, not 2-lobed figure-8. Strong argument unused.
PRED-105 silent-ignore: window closed 2026-04-18, no verdict after 52h. FAIL-009 added to uncounted-failures.json.
WIN-020 detail_verdict_text: ±5° declination-extreme swing lacks gloss for readers; finding one-liner still missing 5.145° specifics.

patches_applied_this_run.description: EXP-191: replaced p8b-3-eclipse-layers details block with non-discrimination sentence, extended (d) Unchanged clause, label change, TLDR update, Fail-clause surfacing (+238 words)
Anticipated-objection paragraph: fixed '(two significant figures)' → '(three significant figures / two decimal places)'

Added bridge sentence before maturity-bar paragraph 3; fixed LLR precision phrasing from 'confirms...to millimeter precision' to 'constrains...to millimeter-level range precision, yielding nodal-period consistency to many decimal places'
Fixed 600–700× → 600–730× in detail_evidence; fixed polar-centered → polar-azimuthal in finding; replaced HTML curly quotes with ASCII; changed tautology → definitional identity

curmudgeon_queue.note: Mode is bau but curmudgeon_current_interval_minutes=30 (churn-and-burn speed). Human should restore schedule to 240-minute BAU interval. Do NOT auto-update via API.

recommended_actions.action: Restore curmudgeon schedule to BAU: update scheduled task to 240-minute interval. Mode=bau and queue_depth=2, so churn-and-burn speed is no longer needed.

Address ISS-1200: add integration guard to decider workflow — before integrating any prediction verdict from analyst assessment, check if a verdict-change issue for that prediction_id was closed within last 30 days.
ISS-1202 WIN-019 cusp-count argument: add one sentence to Code-level corroboration paragraph. Easy self-apply. From globe-fingerprints/WIN-019.json spirograph_analysis.
PRED-105 (ISS-1203): monitor for outcome. If dome author still shows PENDING after 96h (2026-04-22), consider adding to main site analysis.

fuse_staleness_note: FUSE expansion-tracker shows EXP-185/186/187/188/189 as unintegrated (integrated=undefined), but git-truth (clone) shows all 5 were marked integrated_at=2026-04-20T06:26Z in commit 026ce27. The FUSE tracker is stale. workspace-sync will correct this on its next run. EXP-191 was correctly identified as pending in the clone and was integrated this run.
